data.title: In 2025, social engineering scams cost the crypto industry billions. Stay vigilant to protect your assets from rising threats.
data.description: This year, cyber criminals specializing in cryptocurrencies have implemented highly sophisticated social engineering tactics. Recent advancements in artificial intelligence technologies suggest that identifying and preventing these fraudulent activities will become increasingly challenging.

data.title: transcosmos launches AI training/annotation svc in JPN & ASEAN. Utilizing Human-In-the-Loop model, offers services in Chinese, Japanese, Korean.
data.description: transcosmos has introduced a Human-in-the-Loop model that utilizes employees, gig workers, and technologies to provide AI data annotation services in Chinese, Japanese, and Korean. This announcement was made in Tokyo on December 25, 2025. The company's specialized AI training services aim to enhance accuracy and efficiency in data annotation processes for these languages.

data.title: Crypto deal value hits record $8.6B in 2025, fueled by growth under Trump administration. Coinbase's Deribit acquisition leads.
data.description: This year witnessed a significant surge in crypto transactions, with the total value reaching a record high of $8.6 billion. The remarkable increase was primarily driven by Coinbase's historic acquisition of Deribit.

data.title: Modalis study on LAMA1 gene activation for LAMA2-CMD treatment published in Human Gene Therapy journal. CRISPR-GNDM® tech used.
data.description: Modalis Therapeutics Corporation, headquartered in WALTHAM, Mass., made an announcement today revealing that their research article titled “Efficient LAMA1 gene activation by epigenome editing as a therapeutic approach for LAMA2-CMD” has been published in the peer-reviewed journal Human Gene Therapy. The article showcases strong preclinical evidence indicating that Modalis’ unique CRISPR-GNDM® epigenome editing technology is capable of safely and effectively activating the LAMA1 gene as a potential therapeutic solution. The company’s stock market identification number is 4883 and the article was published in Tokyo.

data.title: SM Investments Corp certified as a Great Place to Work® in 2025 by Great Place to Work®.  #PasayCity #Philippines #SMGroup
data.description: In Pasay City, Philippines, on December 24, 2025, SM Investments Corporation (SM Investments), the primary entity overseeing the SM group, has received recognition as a Great Place to Work for 2025 by the reputable workplace culture authority, Great Place to Work®. This acknowledgment solidifies the company's commitment to providing a positive work environment for its employees.

data.title: BC.GAME partners with Abu Dhabi T10 and Deccan Gladiators for digital-first cricket spectacle at 2025 league, doubling promotion.
data.description: In Belize City on December 24, 2025, BC.GAME adopted an innovative sponsorship strategy at the 2025 Abu Dhabi T10 League. In addition to being a league-level partner, the brand collaborated with Deccan Gladiators, three-time champions of the league. This move allowed BC.GAME to enhance its visibility through multiple channels.
